# Signalsmith Stretch vendored headers

Vendored for native audio pitch-preserving playback.

| Component | Source | Commit | License |
|-----------|--------|--------|---------|
| Signalsmith Stretch | https://github.com/Signalsmith-Audio/signalsmith-stretch | `57b93f4e9206a089a45387eaa39bdc9f310d3308` | MIT |
| Signalsmith Linear | https://github.com/Signalsmith-Audio/linear | `7f53cdd1ccd52b409dacf2af24e7ff838c5580cd` | MIT |

Only the runtime headers and license files are vendored. Demo, test, web, and CLI files are intentionally excluded.
